notes: Cache hardening + Gemma 4 multi-turn fix + GLM-5.1/DeepSeek-V3.2 absorb fix + GH issue #66 JIT+TurboQuant guard. Gemma 4 mixed-attention models (sliding+full) auto-bypass prefix cache to cure word-loop regressions at rep_penalty=1.1. RotatingKVCache meta_state preservation prevents Gemma 4 sliding-window state corruption. New per-request cache_salt / skip_prefix_cache fields for benchmark isolation. fp32-SDPA on the L==1 MLA absorb branch in deepseek_v32.py cures GLM-5.1 / DeepSeek-V3.2 decode-time repetition loops without slowing down other MLA models (Mistral 4, Qwen3.5 MLA). bf16 numpy round-trip now uses fp32 (not fp16) for full attention KV precision. Live verified on 9 models multi-turn 7/7 each: Qwen3-0.6B, Qwen3.5-4B-JANG_4K, Qwen3.5-VL-4B-JANG_4S (VL+image), Qwen3.5-122B-A10B-JANG_2S (VL+hybrid SSM), Nemotron-Cascade-2-30B-JANG_2L, Nemotron-3-Super-120B-JANG_2L, Gemma-4-26B-JANG_4M, Gemma-4-31B-JANG_4M, MiniMax-M2.5-JANG_2L. UI: Import button cut-off fix, SessionView header overflow scroll, MessageList scroll-break tightened with wheel handler. NO-REGRESSION-CHECKLIST.md added with mandatory pre-release test matrix.
